title: Cache Dir
documentation:
## Purpose

Cache Dir specifies the filesystem path where the application stores cached data, including model artifacts, embeddings, and API response caches. Centralizing the cache directory simplifies backup and disk-space management.

## When to use

Set this when the default cache location (typically a platform-specific application data directory) is unsuitable, such as when a larger or faster disk is available at a different path. Relative paths are resolved from the application's working directory unless documented otherwise.

## Notes

The path must not contain null bytes. Ensure the process has read and write permission to the specified directory. Changing the cache directory does not migrate existing cached data; the new directory will be populated from scratch on first use.
